== History ==
Napkins in Disguise was formed in September 2013 when the roster of [[Denial eSports.West]] departed the organization and created a new team. The team's first achievement finishing 2nd at the Season 1 [[MOBAFire Challenger Series]] that they were participating in with their previous name.

The team would go on to play in other events such as the [[North American Challenger League]] and go on to qualify in the [[North American Season 4 Promotion Tournament Qualifier 1|NA S4 Promo Qualifiers]] allowing them to play for a spot in the upcoming Season 4 LCS Spring Season. 

However, it would be announced in November 2013 that the team would disband, giving up their promo spot, stating that "the team 'toppled over' for a 'multitude of reasons'."<ref>[http://www.ongamers.com/articles/north-american-team-napkins-in-disguise-disband-for-undisclosed-reasons/1100-155/ NiD Disband]</ref>
